shorts.title: Army Under Secretary Tours Scranton Army Ammunition Plant
shorts.title_distilled: Army Under Secretary Tours Scranton Army Ammunition Plant.
shorts.description: SCRANTON, Pa. — The Under Secretary of the Army, Honorable Michael Obadal, visited the Scranton Army Ammunition Plant on March 19. SCAAP is a government-owned, contractor-operated facility, and is one of 17 arsenals, depots, and ammunition plants that are sub…

shorts.description: SCRANTON, LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — As final exam preparations are underway, students at the University of Scranton were able to take part in a fun stress-reliever. Dozens of dogs took over the campus for some much-needed pet therapy. Now in its 20‑plus‑year run, Canines on Campus hopes to help students ease stress and anxiety. The [...]

shorts.title: Memorial honors fallen PennDOT workers
shorts.description: DUNMORE, LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — It's a solemn reminder to slow down and pay attention in work zones on the road: A memorial service on Tuesday in Dunmore brought together Pennsylvania Department of Transportation (PennDOT) leaders and union members to honor road and public works employees who never made it home from the job. PennDOT [...]

shorts.description: LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — An incident that started in Carbondale led police on a high-speed chase down the Casey Highway that ended with a car crashing in Scranton and the suspect is on the run on Tuesday night. It all started around 1:00 p.m. in Carbondale near South Main Street and 7th Avenue. 28/22 News [...]
